name: DecisionGraph
description: AI decisions can be opaque across runs; DecisionGraph is an event-sourced audit trail for agent choices; it gives teams traceable and replayable accountability.

name: SchemaPilot
description: Schema drift breaks data pipelines over time; SchemaPilot is a guided schema validation and migration toolchain; it keeps integrations stable with fewer breakages.

name: PECR
description: Compliance requirements are hard to operationalize consistently; PECR is a reference implementation repository for the PECR framework; it accelerates adoption with production-ready patterns.

name: retokenization-invariance-atlas
description: Prompt reformatting can silently change model outputs; retokenization-invariance-atlas is a deterministic benchmark for retokenization effects; it helps teams validate robustness before deployment.

name: ScrubID
description: Interpretability claims are often hard to verify; ScrubID is an identifiability-aware auditing toolkit for mechanistic studies; it supports evidence-based and reproducible conclusions.

name: certipatch
description: Frozen models can fail specs without safe retraining paths; certipatch is a reproducible specification-repair framework with replayable certificates; it enables fix-and-verify workflows teams can trust.

name: discover-then-distill-paper
description: Adaptation gains can be confused with distillation gains; discover-then-distill-paper is a compute-matched experimental framework separating both effects; it yields clearer tuning decisions.

name: cost-watchdog
description: LLM and API spend can spike before teams notice; cost-watchdog is a real-time usage and budget guardrail monitor; it prevents surprise overruns.

name: VeilPack
description: Sensitive artifacts are risky to share across teams; VeilPack is a secure packaging system with encryption and integrity manifests; it enables safer transfer and verification.

name: ContextGraph
description: Context gets fragmented across tools and sessions; ContextGraph is a graph-based context model linking entities and retrieval paths; it improves continuity and recall.

name: incitape
description: Agent runs are hard to audit after the fact; incitape is an immutable trace recorder for prompts, actions, and outputs; it enables reliable replay and review.

name: AvalancheLLM
description: Activation cascades can create unstable model behavior under scaling; AvalancheLLM is an experimental analysis suite for token-layer event cascades; it helps detect brittleness earlier.

name: Veil
description: Sensitive data can leak through normal processing paths; Veil is a runtime redaction and policy enforcement layer; it reduces exposure risk in production workflows.

name: egress-lockfile
description: Uncontrolled outbound traffic creates compliance and security risk; egress-lockfile is a versioned allowlist for egress destinations; it enforces predictable network boundaries.

name: AgentGate
description: Autonomous agents need controlled approvals in enterprise environments; AgentGate is a policy and approval gateway for agent actions; it keeps automation compliant and governable.

name: AnnexOps
description: Compliance annexes become messy across owners and versions; AnnexOps is an operations workflow for tracking and validating annex documents; it improves audit readiness.

name: flakeguard
description: Flaky tests hide real regressions and waste CI time; flakeguard is a GitHub Actions rerun analyzer for flake detection; it improves signal quality in pipelines.

name: BatteryPassportCompiler
description: Battery passport data is hard to validate and prove; BatteryPassportCompiler is a deterministic compiler with cryptographic proofs and signatures; it provides verifiable compliance outputs.

name: cis-technical-report
description: Reliability practices are often documented inconsistently; cis-technical-report is a structured technical report on the CIS methodology; it gives teams a practical implementation reference.

name: cachemedicpp-research
description: KV-cache failures can be hard to reproduce and fix; cachemedicpp-research is an experimental toolkit for cache corruption and stabilization studies; it supports more reliable inference.

name: intake-routing-engine
description: Manual intake triage slows response times; intake-routing-engine is a rule-based request routing system; it directs work to the right queue faster.
